allow: Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\('ZodError exists:', typeof z.ZodError\); try { z.object\({ email: z.string\(\).email\(\) }\).parse\({ email: 'bad' }\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Error type:', e.constructor.name\); console.log\('instanceof z.ZodError:', e instanceof z.ZodError\); }")
